---
title: "Lectures"
---

# Teaching

I teach quantitative and computational methods with a focus on making
algorithmic thinking accessible to business students — connecting optimization
and data-driven decision-making to practical, everyday problems.

## Programming: Everyday Decision-Making Algorithms

Kühne Logistics University · [ongoing]{.cv-meta}

An English-language course based on the book *Algorithms to Live By*. It
introduces business students to algorithmic decision-making — from optimal
stopping and scheduling to caching and randomness — alongside a hands-on
introduction to Python, with no prior programming experience required.

[Course website →](https://courses.nilsroemer.com)
